seo.title: Asset Studios — generate sprites, sound, and 3D
seo.description: Asset studios generate sprites, sound effects, and 3D models with AI, accept your own uploads and BYO files, and bind everything to your game — all inside your storage quota.

hero.heading: Make the art without leaving the tab.
hero.sub: The asset studios generate sprites, sound effects, and 3D models with AI, accept your own uploads and bring-your-own files, and bind it all into your game. Everything you create or import counts toward your organization's storage quota, so the costs stay visible.

sections.title: Sprite forge
sections.body: Describe the sprite you need and the forge generates it — characters, items, tiles, and backgrounds — from a text prompt. Generated art lands in your asset library and can be bound directly to the nodes that use it, so a request like "give the boss a roar" or "add three pickup gems" can produce both the structure and the art it needs.
caps: Generate 2D art from a description, right inside the workspace.
Generated sprites attach to the scene nodes that reference them.

sections.title: SFX synth
sections.body: The sound studio synthesizes sound effects for your game — pickups, hits, jumps, and ambience — so you can score moments without sourcing audio elsewhere. Like every other asset, generated sound is tracked in your library and can be bound into the game model.
caps: Create sound effects on demand for the moments that need them.
SFX live in your library and bind to the game like any other asset.

sections.title: 3D model generation
sections.body: For 3D projects, the model studio generates meshes from AI and accepts industry-standard 3D files you upload. Models can be placed and transformed in the scene through the same typed-operation system the Architect uses, including 3D transforms, so your imported and generated assets share one consistent pipeline.
caps: Generate models with AI or bring your own 3D files.
Position and orient models through typed 3D-transform operations.

sections.title: Bring your own files, mind your storage
sections.body: Beyond generated and uploaded assets, you can store arbitrary bring-your-own files alongside your project. Everything is organized in a per-project file tree derived from each asset's path and type. Storage is metered per organization — a free tier with a hard cap, paid tiers with included storage and metered overage — so you always know what you're using.
caps: Keep generated assets, uploads, and arbitrary files together, organized by folder.
Storage is counted per organization, with clear included amounts and overage.

connect.label: How it connects
connect.heading: Assets bind into the same game model.
connect.body: Every asset you generate or upload can be bound to a node by the Architect and inspected in Scenes. The GDD stays the source of truth — assets attach to the structure, and the compiled Godot build pulls them in automatically.

ctaStrip.heading: Art, audio, and 3D in one workspace.
ctaStrip.sub: Geek Engine isn't live yet. Subscribe and we'll send the first access window and build notes.
